title: CodeFreedom Recipe
description: Schema for recipe.yaml — defines a CodeFreedom configuration recipe.

name.description: Recipe name (must match the folder name)

description.description: Human-readable description of what this recipe sets up

extends.description: Base recipe to extend. Files from the base recipe are installed first, then this recipe's files are merged on top.

files.description: List of files to copy from this recipe into ~/.codefreedom/

path.description: Source path within the recipe folder

target.description: Target path under ~/.codefreedom/ (defaults to path if omitted)

merge.description: Merge strategy when target already exists

required_secrets.description: Environment variables the user MUST set before using this recipe

optional_config.description: Environment variables with sensible defaults the user MAY override

tools_optional.description: Auxiliary tools (chrome, web, github) that enhance this recipe
